response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with exposure to high-throughput micro-services at Sociomantic and pricing optimization at Optilyz, plus strong testing/craftsmanship discipline. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal/IC6 role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope appear below IC6 expectations for architecting cross-team growth systems, though the AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq and Sociomantic's scale offer adjacent signal worth probing in an interview.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with production experience in TypeScript, C/C++, Java, and DLang matching the language requirements
High-scale, low-latency micro-services experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/mentoring track record
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management
Limited evidence of data aptitude — no metrics platforms, statistical analysis, or measurement system work shown
Scope and influence appear Senior/Staff-level rather than IC6 Principal cross-org systemic leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot fundamentals and high-scale systems background
No telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis track record
